name: Bullet Proof Vest
protection: NIJ 0101.06 level IIIA Soft Armor
description: High performance personal safety and body armor protection vest for VIP and personal use.
features: Lightweight high quality, breathable outer cover
Outer cover made of poly-cotton for easy care and maximum comfort
Close Fit and ultra-thin panel
Front & back soft armor pockets
Removable & washable vest cover

name: Covert Vest
protection: NIJ 0101.06 level IIIA Soft Armor
description: Covert body armor designed to be worn under standard clothing for low visibility protection.
features: Lightweight high quality, breathable and water-resistant vest outer cover
Full Adjustable shoulder & sides
Front & back soft armor pockets
Cooling mesh which resists growth of bacteria and mold while keeping the wearer cool and comfortable by effective heat dissipation
Removable & washable vest cover

name: Covert Vest Shirt
protection: NIJ 0101.06 level IIIA Soft Armor
description: Ultra-lightweight covert vest shirt that is worn directly as a base layer under standard uniforms or clothing.
features: Lightweight high quality, breathable and water-resistant vest shirt
Removable and washable shirt

name: Modular Vest (Desert Camo)
protection: NIJ 0101.06 level IIIA Soft Armor upgradable to level III/IV by adding Hard Armor Plates
description: Modular tactical vest with customizable protection areas and extensive MOLLE load-bearing capabilities.
features: Maximum protection selection options offering front, back, upper arm, shoulder, groin, collar and sides with addition of side plates.
Full MOLLE webbing system which facilitates installing of adds on equipment like magazine / pouches, GPS, small pack and hydration system.
Adjustable shoulder straps and sides for better fitment
Front and Back Soft Armor and Hard Armor pockets
1000D Fire Retard Outer cover manufactured from tough, lightweight nylon fabric
Emergency Drag Handle
Water Resistant Vest Cover, Soft Armor & HAP's Cover
OPTIONAL: Detachable pouches including Magazine pouches, Small Pack, Hydration system etc.
OPTIONAL: Front / Side Pockets, magazine pouches or front and back Velcro strip on upper chest for ID.

name: PASGT Combat Helmet
protection: NIJ STD 0101.06 Level IIIA for .44 Mag and .357SIG (Bullet/Fragment proof, shock-absorption, fire retardant)
description: The classic Personnel Armor System for Ground Troops helmet providing maximum coverage area and ballistic security.
features: Provides maximum coverage and protection as compared to other Combat Helmets.
Includes a 4-Points or 5-Points suspension system using natural leather, cotton chin straps, and nylon webbings for maximum durability and comfort.
Polyurethane or Polyurea Matte surface treatment providing great concealment.
Optionally equipped with night vision shroud, ballistic visor, side rails, and NVG retention bungees for accessory attachment.
Available in sizes S/M/L.

name: PASGT Boltless Combat Helmet
protection: NIJ STD 0101.06 Level IIIA for .44 Mag and .357SIG (Bullet/Fragment proof, shock-absorption, fire retardant)
description: PASGT helmet utilizing a boltless shell design to eliminate weak points created by drilled hardware holes.
features: The PASGT Helmet provides maximum coverage and protection as compared to other Combat Helmets.
Polyurethane or Polyurea Matte surface treatment providing great concealment.
Optionally equipped with night vision shroud, ballistic visor, side rails, and NVG retention bungees.
Available in sizes S/M/L.

name: MICH Combat Helmet
protection: NIJ STD 0101.06 Level IIIA for .44 Mag and .357SIG (Bullet/Fragment proof, shock-absorption, fire retardant)
description: Modular Integrated Communications Helmet designed for better integration with communication gear and headsets.
features: Polyurethane or Polyurea Matte surface treatment providing great concealment.
Optionally equipped with night vision shroud, ballistic visor, side rails, and NVG retention bungees.
Available in sizes S/M/L.

name: MICH High Cut Helmet
protection: NIJ STD 0101.06 Level IIIA for .44 Mag and .357SIG (Bullet/Fragment proof, shock-absorption, fire retardant)
description: High cut combat helmet providing a maximized field of view and seamless compatibility with modern tactical communications headsets.
features: Retention system comes with 7 heat sealed durable, breathable, and low absorbency memory pads and dial adjustment for maximum fitment.
High cut design improves the field of vision and allows better compatibility with modern communication equipment.
Polyurethane or Polyurea Matte surface treatment providing great concealment.
Equipped with night vision shroud, side rails, and NVG retention bungees for device attachment.
Available in sizes S/M/L.

name: MICH Mid Cut Helmet
protection: NIJ STD 0101.06 Level IIIA for .44 Mag and .357SIG (Bullet/Fragment proof, shock-absorption, fire retardant)
description: Mid cut combat helmet offering a balanced compromise between side-coverage protection and tactical headset clearance.
features: Retention system comes with 7 heat sealed durable, breathable, and low absorbency memory pads and dial adjustment for maximum fitment.
Polyurethane or Polyurea Matte surface treatment providing great concealment.
Equipped with night vision shroud, side rails, and NVG retention bungees.
Available in sizes S/M/L.

name: Hard Armor Plates (Single Curve)
description: Single-curve ballistic inserts designed for chest and back protection in plate carriers and tactical vests.

name: Hard Armor Plates (Multi-Curve & Side Plates)
description: Anatomically shaped multi-curve ballistic plates for enhanced body contouring and side plates for lateral protection.

name: UHMWPE UD Ballistic Fabric
description: High-grade Ultra High Molecular Weight Polyethylene Uni-Directional fabric rolls and pre-cut sheets for soft and hard armor manufacturing.

variants.protection: NIJ 0101.06 Level IIIA for 9mm, .44 Mag, and .357SIG

name: Tactical Helmet Visor (with Side Rails)
protection: NIJ 0101.06 level IIIA for .44 Mag, .357SIG & 9mm
description: Detachable ballistic visor designed to attach directly to tactical helmets equipped with side rails.
features: Visor used in conjunction with bullet proof helmet & side rails.
Compatible with PASGT / MICH / FAST helmet architectures.
Detachable visor provides maximum face protection.
Physical specifications - Length: 360mm, Height: 145mm, Thickness: 21mm, Weight <1.55 kg.

name: Standard Helmet Visor (Bolt-on)
protection: NIJ 0101.06 level IIIA for .44 Mag, .357SIG & 9mm
description: Detachable face shield visor designed for helmets without accessory side rails, providing full frontal facial protection.
features: Visor used in conjunction with standard bullet proof helmets.
Compatible with PASGT / MICH / FAST helmet architectures.
Detachable visor provides maximum face protection.
Physical specifications - Length: 360mm, Height: 145mm, Thickness: 21mm, Weight <1.55 kg.

name: Tactical Bulletproof Shield (Rectangular)
protection: NIJ 0101.06 level IIIA / III
description: Handheld rectangular body shield featuring high-visibility ballistic glass window and heavy-duty grip handles.
features: Lightweight design with maximized protection coverage.
High visibility bulletproof glass observation window.
Aluminum or Light Steel handles for a secure, ergonomic grip.
Optional: Detachable light, stand, or ground wheels.

name: Tactical Bulletproof Shield (Contoured)
protection: NIJ 0101.06 level IIIA / III
description: Ergonomically contoured body shield optimized for defensive mobility, cut out for weapons support.
features: Lightweight design with contoured outline for weapons integration.
High visibility bulletproof glass observation window.
Aluminum or Light Steel handles for a secure grip.
Optional: Detachable light, stand, or ground wheels.

name: Mobile Trolley Bulletproof Shield
protection: NIJ 0101.06 level IIIA / III
description: Heavy-duty wheeled mobile barrier shield for assault operations, fitted with optional headlights.
features: Mobile wheeled stand for effortless navigation of heavy armor plates.
High visibility bulletproof glass observation window.
Trolley system with locks and handles for dual-officer operation.
Optional: Detachable headlight bars, stand, or caster wheels.

name: Ballistic Briefcase
protection: NIJ 0101.06 level IIIA Soft Armor
description: Discreet personal security briefcase that unfolds in seconds into a full-length body shield.
features: Designed for VIP personnel, businessmen, or bodyguards for high-security protection.
Briefcase outer made of high-quality genuine/synthetic leather or heavy-duty Nylon.
Lightweight construction equipped with a flip-opening system to ensure rapid deployment.
Customized pockets inside for carrying sensitive/valuable documents, magazine pouches, or packs.
Customizable sizing options for specific operational requirements.

name: Ballistic Blanket
protection: NIJ 0101.06 level IIIA / III
description: Flexible heavy-duty protective blanket designed to shield individuals or gear from ballistic impact and blast shrapnel.
features: Blanket made of high-quality, high-strength ballistic materials.
Lightweight construction equipped for rapid, easy deployment in threat situations.
Includes 8 heavy-duty carry handles and quick-link buckles to connect multiple blankets.
Optional support frame to make the blanket free-standing.
Versatile application: quick-install armor for vehicles, boats, and aircraft.

name: EOD / Demining Suit
protection: Offers anti fragmentation system in range of 500 - 650m/s V50 value according to STANAG 2920
description: Professional Explosive Ordnance Disposal suit offering comprehensive protection against blast pressure, fragmentation, heat, and impact shock.
features: Quick release pull-cord system for fast and easy suit removal in emergencies.
Thick localized absorption cushions to dissipate blast waves while retaining operational mobility.
Integrated active cooling system to manage internal heat during prolonged wear.
Integrated hard-wired communication systems for direct squad contact.
Outer cover and materials resistant to high heat and open fire hazards.
Next-generation UHMWPE layups for a superior flexibility-to-weight ratio.
